description: Injection canary probe: sends a scanner-generated canary string as a tool argument to verify whether the server reflects it unescaped in the response (indicating potential injection vulnerability).

assertions.description: Canary must not be reflected verbatim in response (injection vector)

remediation: Tool argument handlers must not reflect raw input back in responses. Validate and sanitize all inputs against a strict JSON schema allowlist. Never pass tool arguments directly to system calls, shell commands, or template renderers.
